stages.concept:
# Unit 157: 시제의 일치 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **시제의 일치**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> He **says** (that) he **is** happy. (주절: 현재 → 종속절: 현재)
> He **said** (that) he **was** happy. (주절: 과거 → 종속절: 과거)

👩‍🏫 선생님: 주절이 **과거**이면, 종속절도 **과거로** 맞춰요!

> She says she **likes** pizza. → She said she **liked** pizza.
> I think he **is** sick. → I thought he **was** sick.
> He says he **will** come. → He said he **would** come.
> She says she **can** swim. → She said she **could** swim.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **예외** — 시제 일치를 하지 않는 경우:

👩‍🏫 선생님: 1) **불변의 진리/일반적 사실**

> The teacher said the earth **goes** around the sun. ✅
> (지구가 태양 주위를 돈다 — 불변의 진리)

👩‍🏫 선생님: 2) **역사적 사실**

> He said Columbus **discovered** America in 1492. ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 3) **현재도 계속되는 습관/사실**

> She said she **gets up** at 6 every day. ✅

**Q. 다음 중 어법상 '틀린' 문장을 고르세요.**
1. He said that he was busy yesterday. 
2. My teacher said that water boiled at 100 degrees. ✅
3. I learned that World War II ended in 1945.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 정답이에요. '물이 100도에서 끓는다'는 것은 불변의 진리이자 과학적 사실이므로 주절의 시제가 과거(said)일지라도 종속절은 항상 현재시제(boils)를 써야 한답니다! (2번은 boiled가 아니라 boils가 되어야 맞습니다.)

🧑‍🎓 학생: 주절이 과거면 종속절도 과거! 불변의 진리, 역사적 사실, 현재 습관은 예외! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 157: 시제의 일치 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
I believe that he (     ) here tomorrow.
> **정답** will be

---

**02.** She said that she ? busy.
> **정답** was

---

**03.** He told me that he ? to Seoul the day before.
> **정답** had gone

---

**04.** I knew that she ? a teacher.
> **정답** was

---

**05.** She said that she ? leave early.
> **정답** would

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He said that he is happy.
(주절 과거 → 종속절도 과거)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is → was

---

**07.** She told me that she will come tomorrow.
(주절 과거)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** will → would

---

**08.** I knew that she has a cat.
(주절 과거)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** has → had

---

**09.** He said that he goes to school by bus.
(주절 과거)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** goes → went

---

**10.** She said that she can swim well.
(주절 과거)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** can → could

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그는 바쁘다고 말했다.
He said that he busy.
> **정답** was

---

**12.** 그녀는 내일 올 것이라고 말했다.
She said that she come the next day.
> **정답** would

---

**13.** 나는 그가 학생이라는 것을 알았다.
I knew that he a student.
> **정답** was

---

**14.** 그는 서울에 살고 있다고 말했다.
He said that he in Seoul.
> **정답** lived (was living)

---

**15.** 그녀는 수영을 할 수 있다고 말했다.
She said that she swim.
> **정답** could

---

**16.** 시제의 일치 예외: 불변의 진리
The teacher said that the Earth (     ) around the Sun.
> **정답** goes (revolves) — 불변의 진리이므로 현재시제 유지

---

**17.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그는 피곤하다고 말했다.
He that said he was tired
> **정답** He / said / that / he / was / tired

---

**18.** 그녀는 요리를 잘한다고 말했다.
She that said she could cook well
> **정답** She / said / that / she / could / cook / well

---

**19.** 나는 그가 떠났다는 것을 알았다.
knew I that he had left
> **정답** I / knew / that / he / had / left

---

**20.** 그는 다음 날 올 것이라고 말했다.
He that said he would come the next day
> **정답** He / said / that / he / would / come / the / next / day
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 157: 시제의 일치 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
I knew that he ___________ the new student.
helped
had helped
will help
is helping
> **정답** helped, had helped

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I thought you _________ to the hospital last night.
go
went
will go
going
> **정답** went

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
My little sister didn't know that water _____________
at 0°C.
would freeze
froze
freezes
freeze
> **정답** freezes

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Emma said that lunchtime at her school __________
at noon Monday through Friday.
starts
started
had started
will start
> **정답** starts

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 모두
고르시오. (2개)
He __________ his hands as soon as he __________
home.
washes - will get
washed - gets
washes - gets
washed - got
> **정답** washes - gets, washed - got

---

**06.** 다음 문장의 시제를 바꾸어 나타낼 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
The boy knows that the sun rises in the east.
→ The boy knew that the sun ____________ in the
east.
has risen
rises
rose
would rise
> **정답** rises

---

**07.** 다음 문장의 시제를 바꾸어 나타낼 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
We know that Messi can score more goals.
→ We knew that Messi _________________ more
goals.
scores
could score
can score
scored
> **정답** could score

---

**08.** 다음 문장의 시제를 바꾸어 나타낼 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
모두 고르시오.
Steven tells me that his only hobby is to play online
games.
→ Steven told me that his only hobby
_________________ online games.
is to play
was to play
will be to play
has been to play
> **정답** is to play, was to play

---

**09.** 다음 문장의 시제를 바꾸어 나타낼 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
I believe that your company will be successful.
→ I believed that your company _________________
successful.
were
would be
is
will be
> **정답** would be

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 관광객들은 놀이동산에 방문하기를 원한다고 말했다.
The tourist says that they wanted to visit the
amusement park.
The tourist said that they wanted to visit the
amusement park.
The tourist says that they want to visit the
amusement park.
The tourist said that they want to visit the
amusement park.
> **정답** The tourist said that they wanted to visit the
amusement park.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 그 팀이 경기에 대한 준비가 되지 않았다고 생각했다.
I think that the team had not been ready for
the game.
I thought that the team is not ready for the
game.
I think that the team was not ready for the
game.
I thought that the team had not been ready
for the game.
> **정답** I thought that the team had not been ready for the
game.

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 내게 수업이 매일 9시에 시작한다고 말했다.
She tells me that her school starts at nine
everyday.
She tells me that her school started at nine
everyday.
She told me that her school starts at nine
everyday.
She told me that her school started at nine
everyday.
> **정답** She told me that her school starts at nine everyday.

---

**13.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 선생님은 달이 지구 주위를 돈다고 말씀하셨다.
The teacher said that the moon goes around
the earth.
The teacher says that the moon goes around
the earth.
The teacher said that the moon went around
the earth.
The teacher said that the moon going around
the earth.
> **정답** The teacher said that the moon goes around the
earth.

---

**14.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 최초의 올림픽 경기가 아테네에서 개최되었다고
말했다.
He said that the first Olympic Games had been
held in Athens.
He said that the first Olympic Games were
held in Athens.
He says that the first Olympic Games are held
in Athens.
He says that the first Olympic Games were
held in Athens.
> **정답** He said that the first Olympic Games were held in
Athens.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
The teacher said that the test would be
cancelled.
I didn't know why David was absent from
school.
I thought that he had gone to Japan.
Tony said that he has lost his English
textbook.
> **정답** Tony said that he has lost his English textbook.

---

**16.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
He said that he gets up at six every day.
John told me that his father read newspapers
before breakfast every day.
My teacher said that water boils at 100°C
She said that her English teacher is a
Canadian.
> **정답** John told me that his father read newspapers before
breakfast every day.

---

**17.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
I thought that he could help me.
My teacher said that World War II started in
1939.
They believed that she has kept her promise.
Tina told me that she had met Chris on her
way to school.
> **정답** They believed that she has kept her promise.

---

**18.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
The boy knew that the moon and the earth
pull toward each other.
They said that they will take the first train to
Seoul.
He told me that he was born and raised in
Korea.
My teacher told us that practice makes
perfect.
> **정답** They said that they will take the first train to Seoul.

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The teacher told the boy that
seven minus two equaled five.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** equaled → equals

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The student promised that he
will not cheat on the test.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** will → would
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 157 시제의 일치중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 괄호 안에 주어진 말을 어법에 맞게 빈칸에 쓰시오.
The teacher said that light [travel]  faster than
sound.
정답 travels

---

**02.** 괄호 안에 주어진 말을 어법에 맞게 빈칸에 쓰시오.
They knew that the French Revolution
[break out] (     )  in 1789.
정답 broke out

---

**03.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 괄호 안의 말을 이용하여
문장을 완성하시오.
나는 그가 행복한 삶을 살았다고 생각했다.
힌트 (     ) live a happy life
I thought that  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
 before he died.
정답 he, had, lived, a, happy, life

---

**04.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 괄호 안의 말을 이용하여
문장을 완성하시오.
내 남동생은 Edison이 백열전구를 발명했다는 것을 알지
못했다.
힌트 (     ) invent a lightbulb
My little brother didn't know that  (     )  
  (     ) .
• light bulb 백열전구
정답 Edison, invented, a, lightbulb

---

**05.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
Peter는 일요일마다 도서관에 간다고 나에게 말했다.
힌트 (     ) go to the library
Peter told me that  (     )   (     )   (     )  
 every Sunday.
정답 he, goes, to, the, library

---

**06.** 다음 문장에서 주절의 시제를 과거로 바꿀 때 빈칸에
알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
She doesn't know that he has gone to America.
→ She didn't know that he  (     )   (     )  to
America.
정답 had, gone

---

**07.** 다음 문장에서 주절의 시제를 과거로 바꿀 때 빈칸에
알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
She tells me that we will be able to use the car that
day.
→ She told me that we  (     )   (     )  
 use the car that day.
정답 would, be, able, to

---

**08.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 어법에 맞게 고쳐 문장을
완성하시오.
Who discovered that the Earth moved around the
Sun?
Who discovered that the Earth
정답 moves around the Sun?

---

**09.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 어법에 맞게 고쳐 문장을
완성하시오.
The teacher said that the Second World War ends
in 1945.
The teacher said that the Second Word War
정답 ended in 1945.

---

**10.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 어법에 맞게 고쳐 문장을
완성하시오.
My father always said that practice made perfect.
My father always said that 
정답 practice makes perfect.

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 157: 시제의 일치 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) I knew that she ___________ the new classmate. helped had helped will help is helping
> 정답: helped, had helped

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I thought you _________ to the dentist last week. go went will go going
> 정답: went

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
My little brother didn't know that the earth _____________ around the sun.
would revolve revolved revolves revolve
> 정답: revolves

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom said that the school bus __________ at 7:30 every morning.
arrives arrived had arrived will arrive
> 정답: arrives

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 바르게 짝지어진 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) She __________ her teeth as soon as she __________ up. brushes - will wake brushed - wakes brushes - wakes brushed - woke
> 정답: brushes - wakes, brushed - woke

---

**06.** 다음 문장의 시제를 바꾸어 나타낼 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The girl knows that the moon shines at night.
→ The girl knew that the moon ____________ at night. has shone shines shone would shine
> 정답: shines

---

**07.** 다음 문장의 시제를 바꾸어 나타낼 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
We know that Amy can solve difficult puzzles.
→ We knew that Amy _________________ difficult puzzles. solves could solve can solve solved
> 정답: could solve

---

**08.** 다음 문장의 시제를 바꾸어 나타낼 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 모두 고르시오.
Tom tells me that his favorite subject is science. → Tom told me that his favorite subject _________________ science. is was will be has been
> 정답: is, was

---

**09.** 다음 문장의 시제를 바꾸어 나타낼 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I believe that your team will win the tournament.
→ I believed that your team _________________ the tournament. were would win is will win
> 정답: would win

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 학생들은 박물관에 방문하기를 원한다고 말했다.
The students says that they wanted to visit the museum.
The students said that they wanted to visit the museum.
The students says that they want to visit the museum.
The students said that they want to visit the museum.
> 정답: The students said that they wanted to visit the

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 그 선수가 시합에 대한 준비가 되지 않았다고 생각했다.
I think that the player had not been ready for the match.
I thought that the player is not ready for the match.
I think that the player was not ready for the match.
I thought that the player had not been ready for the match.
> 정답: I thought that the player had not been ready for the

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 나에게 도서관이 매일 8시에 문을 연다고 말했다.
He tells me that the library opens at eight everyday.
He tells me that the library opened at eight everyday.
He told me that the library opens at eight everyday.
He told me that the library opened at eight everyday.
> 정답: He told me that the library opens at eight everyday.

---

**13.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 선생님은 지구가 둥글다고 말씀하셨다.
The teacher said that the earth is round.
The teacher says that the earth is round.
The teacher said that the earth was round.
The teacher said that the earth being round.
> 정답: The teacher said that the earth is round.

---

**14.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 한국전쟁이 1950년에 시작되었다고 말했다.
She said that the Korean War had started in 1950.
She said that the Korean War started in 1950.
She says that the Korean War starts in 1950.
She says that the Korean War started in 1950.
> 정답: She said that the Korean War started in 1950.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
The teacher said that the quiz would be postponed.
I didn't know why Amy was absent from class.
I thought that she had gone to Canada.
He said that he has lost his math textbook.
> 정답: He said that he has lost his math textbook.

---

**16.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
